allow: Bash(python -c "import json; data=json.load\(open\('c:/base/analytics_dbt/target/manifest.json'\)\); nodes={k:v for k,v in data.get\('nodes', {}\).items\(\) if 'prcoess' in str\(v.get\('config', {}\).get\('column_types', {}\)\)}; [print\(k, v['config']['column_types']\) for k,v in nodes.items\(\)]")

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem C:\\ -Directory | ForEach-Object { $size = \(Get-ChildItem $_.FullName -Recurse -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object Length -Sum\).Sum; [PSCustomObject]@{Dir=$_.Name; GB=[math]::Round\($size/1GB,1\)} } | Sort-Object GB -Descending | Select-Object -First 10 | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\15\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d base -c "SELECT short_org, donor_org, product_primary_item_nbr, inv_uom, lines_short, round\(total_short_qty::numeric,1\) as total_short_qty, round\(donor_available_qty::numeric,1\) as donor_available_qty, lines_coverable, donor_overcommitted FROM analytics.int_castle__mcmaster_03_cross_ship WHERE lines_coverable = 0 LIMIT 20;")
